systems.system_notes: Humeral shaft locking plate system within the DePuy Synthes trauma portfolio for open reduction and plate fixation of humeral shaft fractures.

trays.tray_notes: Official DePuy Synthes upper-extremity trauma resources anchor the dedicated humeral shaft plating instrumentation workflow.

components.component_notes: Official DePuy Synthes trauma catalogue resources identify the humeral shaft plate family within the LCP system.
Official trauma references describe compatible locking screw fixation used with the humeral shaft plate system.
Official trauma references describe guide and instrumentation workflow for humeral shaft plate application.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current official sources confirm the humeral shaft plate family and upper-extremity trauma references, but a full normalized product-code matrix has not yet been extracted in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper inventory-form, technique, or sterile implant listing pass is required for comprehensive product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
